ModMetaData.name: Dungeon Pack (Continued)
ModMetaData.author: swablu
ModMetaData.description:
[img]https://img.litet.net/logos/Info.png[/img] Update of swablus mod https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3140486097
[img]https://img.litet.net/logos/Notice.png[/img]
[table] [tr][td][url=https://discord.gg/h5TY6DA][img]https://img.litet.net/logos/Discord.png[/img][/url][/td] [td][url=https://github.com/emipa606/DungeonPack][img]https://img.litet.net/logos/Github.png[/img][/url][/td] [/tr] [tr] [td][img]https://img.litet.net/logos/SafeToAdd.png[/img][/td] [td][img]https://img.litet.net/logos/RemoveMayWork.png[/img][/td] [/tr] [/table]
[img]https://img.litet.net/logos/OriginalDescription.png[/img] [b]This mod is not being maintained, if you would like to update it, here is the source code[/b] https://github.com/Anton-Ymous/DungeonPack
Adds 10 new custom quest locations filled with powerful enemies, bosses, and unique loot.
[h1]New Dungeons[/h1] [img]https://img.litet.net/ci2e29f.png[/img]
These quest locations aren't like your ordinary factional bases with the same 3 generic buildings and interchangeable rewards. Each dungeon has a unique challenge, setting, and a powerful custom reward.
Some dungeons include: * Fighting on a pirate ship with cannons * Digging into the mountain to excavate a lost, buried city. * Battling invisible ninja monks * Navigating a maze filled with traps and madmen.
[b]These dungeons are supposed to challenging. They are recommended as lategame challenges unless you go a more 'creative' route. A less challenging version may be released eventually.[/b]
[h1]New Items[/h1] [img]https://img.litet.net/FLK4r2h.png[/img]
Each quest is associated with a powerful relic.
Some relics include: * Reusable mechanoid ally summoner * A cloak that gives the user invisibility * A belt that gives the user phasing abilities * A [i]real zeushammer[/i] that causes a lightning strike on hit
[h1]Obtaining the Quest[/h1] The quests [b] can start by being researched.[/b] Quests can be restarted by using the quest machine once researched.
[h1]Tools Used/Thanks[/h1] Custom Quest Framework Vanilla Expanded Geological Landforms
[h1]Compatibility[/h1] Compatible with CE, though the enemies/items may not be balanced.
[img]https://img.litet.net/logos/ReportingIssues.png[/img] [list] [*] See if the error persists if you just have this mod and its requirements active. [*] If not, try adding your other mods until it happens again. [*] Always post your log using the [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2873415404]Log Uploader[/url] [*] For best support, please use the Discord-channel for error-reporting. [*] Do not report errors by making a discussion-thread, I get no notification of that. [*] If you have the solution for a problem, please post it to the GitHub repository. [*] Use [url=https://github.com/RimSort/RimSort/releases/latest]RimSort[/url] to sort your mods [/list]
